studies.title: Evaluation of the digital health application MAWENDO

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital health application 'Mawendo', as evidenced by the title and detailed descriptions in both the German and English summaries. The intervention group is explicitly described as using the 'MAWENDO digital application'.

_classification.reason: The document describes a study protocol for evaluating the digital health application MAWENDO, outlining the need to demonstrate positive effects compared to standard care. However, it does not provide results or specify if the study is randomized, thus it is classified as a protocol without results.

studies._rejection_reason: The document describes a study protocol for evaluating the digital health application MAWENDO, outlining the need to demonstrate positive effects compared to standard care. However, it does not provide results or specify if the study is randomized, thus it is classified as a protocol without results.

studies.title: Evaluation II of the digital health application MAWENDO
